headline: MLB Daily Recap - April 11, 2026
article:
**HEADLINE:** "Twins Win in Toronto, Giants Fall to Orioles in Baltimore: Recap of Yesterday's MLB Action"

**Game 1: Arizona Diamondbacks @ Philadelphia Phillies**
The Phillies continued their winning ways, edging out the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-3. Kyle Schwarber hit a crucial two-run homer in the 7th inning, securing the win for Philadelphia. Bryce Harper also chipped in with a solo shot, while Adrian Del Castillo's two-run homer for Arizona was not enough to overcome the deficit. Brandon Pfaadt took the loss for the Diamondbacks, allowing four earned runs in 5.2 innings. Taijuan Walker pitched 6.1 strong innings for the Phillies, allowing just one earned run.

**Game 2: Miami Marlins @ Detroit Tigers**
The Detroit Tigers dominated the Miami Marlins 6-1 behind a strong team effort. Otto Lopez hit a two-run homer, while Riley Greene added a solo shot. The Marlins' offense was stifled by the Tigers' pitching staff, which allowed just one run on three hits. The Marlins' pitcher was unable to withstand the onslaught, as they were unable to muster much offense.

**Game 3: Pittsburgh Pirates @ Chicago Cubs**
The Pittsburgh Pirates pulled off a 4-3 upset over the Chicago Cubs. Oneil Cruz hit a two-run homer, while Bryan Reynolds added a solo shot. The Cubs' offense was unable to overcome the deficit, despite Alex Bregman's solo homer. Braxton Ashcraft pitched 6.1 strong innings for the Pirates, allowing just three earned runs.

**Game 4: Minnesota Twins @ Toronto Blue Jays**
The Minnesota Twins defeated the Toronto Blue Jays 7-4 behind a strong team effort. Trevor Larnach hit a two-run homer, while Brooks Lee added a solo shot. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. hit a two-run homer for the Blue Jays, but it was not enough to overcome the deficit. The Twins' pitcher was able to navigate through the Blue Jays' lineup, allowing just four earned runs.

**Game 5: Los Angeles Angels @ Cincinnati Reds**
The Cincinnati Reds defeated the Los Angeles Angels 7-3 behind a strong team effort. Spencer Steer hit a two-run homer, while Elly De La Cruz added a solo shot. The Angels' offense was unable to muster much offense, despite Zach Neto's solo homer.

**Game 6: Athletics @ New York Mets**
The Oakland Athletics defeated the New York Mets 11-6 behind a strong team effort. Shea Langeliers hit a two-run homer, while Tyler Soderstrom added a solo shot. The Mets' offense was unable to overcome the deficit, despite Jeff McNeil's two-run homer.

**Game 7: Chicago White Sox @ Kansas City Royals**
The Kansas City Royals defeated the Chicago White Sox 2-0 behind a strong team effort. Maikel Garcia hit a solo homer, while Michael Wacha pitched a complete game shutout for the Royals. The White Sox' offense was unable to muster much offense.

**Game 8: New York Yankees @ Tampa Bay Rays**
The Tampa Bay Rays defeated the New York Yankees 5-4 behind a strong team effort. Cody Bellinger hit a two-run homer, while Austin Wells added a solo shot. The Yankees' offense was unable to overcome the deficit, despite Max Fried's 6.1 innings of work.

**Game 9: Washington Nationals @ Milwaukee Brewers**
The Washington Nationals defeated the Milwaukee Brewers 3-1 behind a strong team effort. Jacob Young hit a solo homer, while Nasim Nuñez added a two-run single. The Brewers' offense was unable to overcome the deficit, despite William Contreras' solo homer.

**Game 10: San Francisco Giants @ Baltimore Orioles**
The Baltimore Orioles defeated the San Francisco Giants 6-2 behind a strong team effort. Jung Hoo Lee hit a two-run homer, while Heliot Ramos added a solo shot. The Giants' offense was unable to muster much offense, despite Logan Webb's 6.1 innings of work.

**Game 11: Boston Red Sox @ St. Louis Cardinals**
The Boston Red Sox defeated the St. Louis Cardinals 7-1 behind a strong team effort. Jarren Duran hit a two-run homer, while Willson Contreras added a solo shot. The Cardinals' offense was unable to overcome the deficit, despite Ranger Suarez's 6.1 innings of work.

**Game 12: Cleveland Guardians @ Atlanta Braves**
The Cleveland Guardians defeated the Atlanta Braves 6-0 behind a strong team effort. Angel Martínez hit a two-run homer, while José Ramírez added a solo shot. The Braves' offense was unable to muster much offense.

**Game 13: Colorado Rockies @ San Diego Padres**
The San Diego Padres defeated the Colorado Rockies 9-5 behind a strong team effort. Edouard Julien hit a two-run homer, while Mickey Moniak added a solo shot. The Rockies' offense was unable to overcome the deficit, despite Fernando Tatis Jr.'s two-run homer.

**Game 14: Texas Rangers @ Los Angeles Dodgers**
The Los Angeles Dodgers defeated the Texas Rangers 6-3 behind a strong team effort. Brandon Nimmo hit a two-run homer, while Shohei Ohtani added a solo shot. The Rangers' offense was unable to overcome the deficit, despite Emmet Sheehan's 6.1 innings of work.

**Biggest Story of the Day:** The biggest story of the day is the Minnesota Twins' victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, which has catapulted them to the top of the AL Central standings. The Twins' offense was led by Trevor Larnach's two-run homer, while Brooks Lee added a solo shot. The Blue Jays' offense was unable to overcome the deficit, despite Vladimir Guerrero Jr.'s two-run homer.
